CLAUDE.md

This repository uses the AGENTS.md convention for AI assistant context. Project conventions, build commands, naming rules, and silent-failure traps live in AGENTS.md, which is shared across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, Aider, Gemini CLI, and other coding agents.

The line below uses Claude Code’s @ import syntax to inline the AGENTS.md content automatically, so you do not need to read both files.

@AGENTS.md

Add Claude-Code-specific instructions below this line if any are ever needed. Anything in AGENTS.md is shared across all coding agents and should go there instead.

Developed by Ruiwen Zhou.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
